heroSubtitle: Explore the largest boutique of premium cases, fast chargers, crystal screen protectors, and high-fidelity audio gear.
categoriesSubtitle: Handpicked mobile components to power, shield, and style your device.
cablesDesc: Ultra-durable braided cables, USB-C fast charging, and high-speed data transfer.
chargersDesc: High wattage GaN chargers, wireless pads, and multi-port charging hubs.
earphonesDesc: Premium ANC earbuds, headphones, and powerful bluetooth speakers.
powerbanksDesc: Heavy battery backups, slim magnetic power banks, and solar chargers.
casesDesc: Rugged military-grade shells, sleek silicone covers, and magsafe sleeves.
screensDesc: 9H tempered glass, privacy screens, and self-healing hydrogel films.
standsDesc: Desktop adjustments, magnetic car mounts, and stable photography ring light pods.
storefrontSubtitle: Explore our bright LED-lit white concept store. Hover or click on sections to see our layout.
storefrontAlert: Walk through our interactive shelves below:
cablesWallDesc: Dozens of premium braided cables, adapters, and high-speed data line varieties.
casesDisplayDesc: Elegant double-sided shelves loaded with MagSafe case designs for all iOS & Android versions.
counterAreaDesc: Where we assemble accessories, apply screen protectors perfectly, and customize recommendations.
centerDisplayDesc: Our center glowing console showcasing premium GaN power blocks, power banks, and audio gear.
compSubtitle: Not sure what fits? Select your smartphone model below to find perfectly compatible chargers, cables, and screen protection.
phoneSelectPrompt: Please select phone brand and model first.
recommendationContent: Perfect match! Supports complete fast-charging profiles & dimensions.
contactSubtitle: Visit our physical store or message our customer support team.

cablesSpecs: Core: Pure oxygen-free tinned copper (20AWG fast charging)
Outer Shell: Ultra-tough braided ballistic nylon fiber jacket
Connector Types: USB-C to USB-C, USB-C to Lightning, USB-A to C
Features: 100W Power Delivery (PD 3.0), E-Marker intelligent chip
Bend Lifespan: Tested to withstand over 30,000+ bends
chargersSpecs: Technology: Gallium Nitride (GaN 5 Pro) micro-chip architecture
Safety Suite: Over-current, TempControl 2.0, static shielding
Compatibility: Support PPS, QC 4.0, PD 3.0, and SCP profiles
Design: Foldable prongs, dual USB-C & single USB-A layouts
earphonesSpecs: Drivers: 10mm graphene dynamic drivers with deep bass
Battery Life: Up to 8 hours playback + 32 hours with case
Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.4 with Low Latency Gaming Mode
Sound Profiles: Adaptive active noise cancelling, Transparency mode
Waterproof Rating: IPX5 splash and sweat resistance
powerbanksSpecs: Battery Capacity: 10,000mAh and 20,000mAh dense Li-Polymer grid
Magnetic Fit: MagSafe compatible 15N magnetic strong lock
Output Port: 22.5W USB-A Super Charge & 20W USB-C PD input/output
LED Display: Real-time battery percentage & charging speeds
Form Factor: Ultra slim aircraft-grade aluminum alloy case
casesSpecs: Materials: German Polycarbonate + impact absorbing TPU borders
Protection: certified to military standards (12-foot drop test)
Camera Ring: Raised CNC aluminum frame to shield camera lenses
Buttons: Precision-engineered tactile clicky metal key caps
Finishes: Crystal clear anti-yellowing, matte carbon fiber, pastel TPU
screensSpecs: Strength: 9H Mohs hardness rating double-tempered shield glass
Clarity: 99.9% light transmission index for Retina display
Protection Layers: Anti-dust, Oleophobic oil-repellent coating
Options: Ultra-Clear, Privacy Anti-Spy, Matte Anti-Glare, Hydrogel
Installation: Alignment guide frame included for bubble-free application
standsSpecs: Build: Foldable solid aerospace aluminum alloy bracket
Adjustments: Dual 270-degree rotation angles with heavy joints
Grip: Non-slip silicone protective pads on base and holder tray
Utility: Car vent locks, desktop holders, wireless charging docks
Load Limit: Supports larger models and tablets up to 12.9 inches
appleChargerName: 35W GaN Dual USB-C Charger + Type-C Braided Cable (1m)
appleChargerSpecs: Supports Apple Fast Charging (USB-PD 27W). Recharges to 50% in 25 minutes. Built-in Auto-Disconnect safeguards iPhone battery health.
appleScreenName: 9H Heavy-Duty Privacy Glass with Screen Alignment Frame
appleScreenSpecs: Perfect 2.5D curved-edge fits iPhone dimensions. Screen tint provides private viewing from 28 degrees side angle. Anti-shatter layer.
appleCaseName: Tactile MagSafe Armor Hybrid Case (N52 Strong Magnets)
appleCaseSpecs: Reinforced corners (12-foot military drop-proof). Embedded N52 magnets for super fast charging alignment. Fits precision buttons.
samsungChargerName: 45W Super Fast Charging PPS GaN Plug + 5A Cable
samsungChargerSpecs: Supports Samsung Super Fast Charging 2.0 (PPS 45W). Thermally-insulated GaN build. Fills battery from 0 to 65% in 30 minutes.
samsungScreenName: Ultra-Clear Mohs-9 Tempered Glass (Fingerprint Reader Compatible)
samsungScreenSpecs: High refractive index. Compatible with ultrasonic in-display fingerprint scanner. Scratch-resistant coating.
samsungCaseSpecs: Flexible bumper with structural rigidity. Features built-in alloy folding kickstand. Compatible with Qi wireless chargers.
xiaomiChargerSpecs: Supports Xiaomi HyperCharge protocols. Automatically scales voltages matching device constraints. Cooling metal grids.
xiaomiScreenSpecs: Covers entire curved margins. High touch sensitivity. Electroplated anti-fingerprint oil layer.
xiaomiCaseName: Matte Silicone Liquid Cover (Microfiber Inner Lining)
xiaomiCaseSpecs: Soft velvety touch exterior with impact absorbing fleece internally. Raised bezel protects cameras and screen edges.
realmeChargerSpecs: Fully compatible with SuperVOOC smart flash charge profiles. Dual-chip protection manages heat dissipation dynamically.
realmeScreenName: Edge-to-Edge Tough Premium Hydrogel Protection Screen
realmeScreenSpecs: Self-healing hydrogel handles minor scratches in 24 hours. Ideal for curved infinity screen templates. Matte texture.
realmeCaseSpecs: Hard acrylic yellowing-resistant back plate with flexible TPU margins. Drop certified corners protect phone curves.
exploreVirtualSpotDesc: Click on the white pulsing points of the Zain Phone shop design to reveal product categories and information matching the layout.
systemStandbyDesc: Select your device brand, model, and the product category in the side console, then launch compatibility analyzer to receive detailed fit results.
